title: An Act to Make the Biofuel Commercial Production and Commercial Use Tax Credit and the Renewable Chemicals Tax Credit Refundable
last_house_action: 4/8/2026 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 4/29/2026 - Died in Possession of the Senate when the Legislature adjourned Sine Die and was PLACED IN THE LEGISLATIVE FILES . (DEAD)

actions.description: Received by the Secretary of the Senate on December 9, 2025 and REFERRED to the Committee on TAXATION pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2

Reports READ. On motion by Senator GROHOSKI of Hancock The Majority Ought to Pass As Amended Report ACCEPTED. READ ONCE Committee Amendment "A" (S-639) READ and ADOPTED. Under suspension of the Rules, READ A SECOND TIME and PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED AS AMENDED by Committee Amendment "A" (S-639) Sent down for concurrence.

Reports READ . On motion of Representative SAYRE of Kennebunk, the Majority Ought to Pass as Amended Report was ACCEPTED . The Bill was READ ONCE . Committee Amendment "A" (S-639) was READ and ADOPTED . Under suspension of the rules, the Bill was given its SECOND READING without REFERENCE to the Committee on Bills in the Second Reading . The Bill was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED as Amended by Committee Amendment "A" (S-639) . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
On motion by Senator ROTUNDO of Androscoggin PLACED ON THE SPECIAL APPROPRIATIONS TABLE pending PASSAGE TO BE ENACTED , in concurrence.
Died in Possession of the Senate when the Legislature adjourned Sine Die and was PLACED IN THE LEGISLATIVE FILES . (DEAD)

amendments.label: C "A" (S-639 )
amendments.new_title: An Act to Make the Biofuel Commercial Production and Commercial Use Tax Credit and the Renewable Chemicals Tax Credit Refundable
